missingness: Invasive MBP needs an arterial line (~1-2 s); non-invasive MBP is intermittent (every few min). Choose the source matching your hypotension definition.
common_mistake: Mixing invasive and cuff MAP sources with different sampling rates/bias, producing an inconsistent hypotension exposure.

vitaldb_source: lab_data name='cr' (+ baseline clinical_info.preop_cr; gfr/ccr also available)
missingness: Present within the +/-90-day lab window BUT only when creatinine was ordered postoperatively. Many cases lack postop draws, so an AKI cohort is a SELECTED subset, not all 6,388.
common_mistake: Assuming KDIGO-grade AKI ascertainment for everyone. You can DERIVE an AKI endpoint from pre/post creatinine where draws exist, but there is no pre-labeled AKI field and the urine-output KDIGO criterion is not reliably available postoperatively.

missingness: Near-complete per-case column. Adult-dominant cohort; limited pediatric coverage.

common_mistake: Treating ASA as a precise severity score.
